data.description: Sanoma Corporation buys back its own shares on 24/03/2026.

data.title: QURE SHAREHOLDER ALERT: Hagens Berman Updates uniQure (QURE) Investigation Following Public FDA Rebukes and Allegations of "Distorted" Data
data.description: A leading law firm is reminding investors of the upcoming deadline of April 13 to become the lead plaintiff in a pending lawsuit. In San Francisco on March 24, 2026, Hagens Berman announced it is investigating uniQure N.V. (NASDAQ: QURE) in response to a string of notable criticisms by the Food and Drug Administration. Interested parties have until the specified date to participate in the legal action relating to this company.

data.title: Five Franchise Brands Partner with BrandONE to Accelerate Strategic Expansion
data.description: In Charlotte, N.C. on March 24, 2026, it was reported that the competition for top franchise candidates is increasing within the industry. In response, a rising amount of both new and well-known brands are now dedicating resources towards enhancing their franchise development infrastructure at earlier stages. Specifically, five brands, including Menchie's Frozen Yogurt, are leading this trend by investing in professional franchise development.

data.title: BitGo and Susquehanna provide institutional investors access to prediction markets using crypto collateral amid US regulatory scrutiny.
data.description: Institutional investors now have the opportunity to engage in the trading of event-based contracts using cryptocurrency as collateral. This option has become available amidst increased regulatory attention on prediction markets in the United States. This development comes at a time when there has been an upsurge in the scrutiny faced by such markets, indicating a growing focus on these platforms. This offering provides a new avenue for investors to leverage their crypto holdings for trading purposes. It presents a unique opportunity in the market, especially for those looking to diversify their investment portfolio and explore innovative trading options.

A residential building in an upscale neighborhood of northern Tehran has been reduced to rubbles following strikes by U.S. and Israeli forces on Tuesday, as security remains tight across the area. CGTN Reporter Sepehr Saremi visits the scene and reports from the site.

data.title: Kitron's 2025 annual report released, revealing strong financial performance with revenue reaching $500 million.
data.description: A recent report reveals that the global smartphone market saw a substantial decline of 20% in sales during the second quarter of the year. This drop translates to approximately 300 million fewer smartphones sold compared to the same period last year. The decrease has been attributed to various factors, including the ongoing chip shortage, the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic on production and supply chains, as well as reduced consumer demand. The top three smartphone manufacturers, namely Apple, Samsung, and Xiaomi, also experienced a decrease in sales, with Apple being the most affected, seeing a 27% drop in shipments. Despite the challenging market conditions, analysts remain cautiously optimistic about a potential rebound in the latter part of the year as production ramps up and demand stabilizes.

data.title: NVIDIA introduces Nemotron 3 series at GTC 2026 with 120B-param Super model, 5x faster and improved safety features.
data.description: NVIDIA has introduced the complete Nemotron 3 model lineup at the GTC event in 2026. The lineup includes the impressive 120 billion-parameter Super model, showcasing a significant increase in throughput by 5 times. The new models also come equipped with advanced multimodal safety features, enhancing their capabilities.

data.title: Bitcoin's Strategy remains steadfast during drop; Bernstein analysts suggest flagship share as alternative funding in slow market.
data.description: Analysts pointed out that the flagship preferred share of Bitcoin giant Strategy could serve as a viable funding option in light of sluggish market conditions.

data.title: DataBahn Advances Security Data Pipeline with Autonomous In-Stream Data Intelligence
data.description: At the RSA Conference 2026 in San Francisco, DataBahn.ai introduced a new data pipeline advancement. This evolution enables real-time interpretation, validation, and action on data, speeding up results and increasing the value extracted from enterprise security investments. This innovation is set to transform the way businesses handle data, promising to deliver significant improvements in efficiency and effectiveness.

data.title: Clinch Named Winner of the 2026 AI Excellence Award
data.description: A pioneering Flight Control Platform has been acknowledged for its groundbreaking work in revolutionizing omnichannel advertising with Agentic AI Orchestration. The award-winning Clinch, an AI platform specializing in orchestrating omnichannel campaigns, has been recognized for its achievements in the field. The prestigious honor was bestowed upon Clinch during the 2026 AI Excellence awards ceremony held in New York on March 24th. This recognition solidifies Clinch's position as a leader in utilizing artificial intelligence to streamline omnichannel advertising strategies.

data.title: Micron Stock Falls As Rival SK Hynix Ups Investments
data.description: Following an announcement by memory-chip competitor SK Hynix to invest $8 billion in state-of-the-art equipment from ASML, Micron's stock experienced a decline. The move by SK Hynix to increase its investments has had a negative impact on Micron's stock value, causing it to fall.

data.title: TSMC Hitting Production Capacity Limits, Says Broadcom
data.description: Broadcom, a fabless chipmaker, is facing challenges due to production capacity limitations at Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC). This issue led to a drop in Broadcom's stock value on Tuesday, whereas TSMC's stock experienced an increase. The situation of TSMC reaching its production capacity limits was reported by Broadcom.

data.title: Colossal Launches 2026 Super Mom Competition to Celebrate Everyday Heroes and Support Children's Miracle Network®
data.description: A remarkable mother has the chance to receive a grand prize of $20,000, along with a dream family vacation package, and the opportunity to be featured in NewBeauty Magazine. The announcement was made by Colossal, a renowned professional fundraiser operating on a national level, famous for hosting competitions with a focus on making an impactful difference. The competition, named Super Mom, is set to award these lucrative prizes to the winning mom.

data.title: Oil Prices Rise Because Iran War Isn't Like Liberation Day
data.description: Iran has declared a commitment to achieving "complete victory" and has warned that the Strait of Hormuz will not return to normalcy. This statement comes in the wake of escalating tensions in the region. As a result, oil prices have surged in response to concerns over a potential conflict involving Iran. The situation is distinct from past events like Liberation Day, showing the gravity of the current circumstances. Investors are closely monitoring developments for any impact on global oil markets.

data.title: BofA: Nebius Positioned As Share-Taker In AI Computing
data.description: A recent report revealed that Bank of America has started covering Nebius stock, giving it a buy rating. According to BofA, Nebius is in a strong position to increase its share in the cloud computing market. The bank stated that Nebius is viewed as a key player in AI computing and is poised to make significant strides in this sector. This news was featured on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Tesla Falls Behind Chinese Rival In Europe
data.description: Last month, Chinese automaker BYD outpaced Tesla in registering new vehicles in Europe. According to recent data, BYD registered a higher number of new vehicles compared to Tesla during that period. This marks a notable shift in the competitive landscape of the European automotive market.
